title: tf.sparse.add  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Adds two tensors, at least one of each is aSparseTensor.
If oneSparseTensorand oneTensorare passed in, returns aTensor.  If
both arguments areSparseTensors, this returns aSparseTensor.  The order
of arguments does not matter.  Use vanillatf.add()for adding two denseTensors.
The shapes of the two operands must match: broadcasting is not supported.
